title: August 8th, 2021
body:
daily notes

#professional

))}}

[here](here)'s something about blindnesses



we all have things that we're blind to but when we can't sense that blindstuff rather directly through alternative channels, we don't talk about it. we don't name it, label and parse it, and endlessly dissect it like an autistic person trying to reverse-engineer social intuition. without a name, we can't

when a whole community or species shares that kind of unarticulated blindness, it becomes a social blindness. a kantian, cthulian monstrosity. the innocuity  our personal experience, before  metastasism by mass mutism, is unrecognizable in the [face](face) of that world shows us. the ur-persona, a grotesque mask slipping just enough to constantly remind us of incoherence and madness

so for the love of everything we are and will be and everything we're doing and will do, please get your i's checked. after all losing sight is all too [[human

did neitsche go blind from syphilis? he certainly lost sight

was his book called all too human

https://www.google.com/search?q=neitsche+all+too+human



communication is the machete we use to hack the jungles between us. each word a whack. every statement a risky adventure in some hopeful direction. occasionally you'll stop and listen to the jungle-filtered hacking somewhere nearby, thriftily taking advantage of the moment to relax and reorient your self. if you forget to stop and listen, here are some tips for getting unlost:

just stop

now listen

if you find yourself hacking away again but notice that you still feel unoriented, return to step one

lyrics

i tried doing that but it was no good
so i went back to working on would
i am a maker these are my tools
i learned to use them at my own school
we are all teachers we write our own rules
then we can follow them or act afool
there is no right way to pass this class
cuz in the end all our grades are pulled out our ass

are you working hard or just working hard

i mean are you hard working or hard working

i got no time for y'all jerking my chain while i'm trying to concentrate

i jerk and clean when i got a weight

on my chest is a plate

the most underrated keyboard shortcuts in roam research article

https://daltonmabery.medium.com/the-most-underrated-keyboard-shortcuts-in-roam-research-3ddc34c164b2

#professional

something wicked this way comes movie

when i plunge into the labyrinth inside me

i leave these lines behind me

so i can find a way back to you blindly

from outside these caverns prolly seem black to you

but i left that behind me

i had to

i'm opportunistic but from my pov what else could i be



all ads are billboards. life is a highway that you're driving on. and getting distracted from that is always an existential risk

slang is a foundational subcultural meme. consider the immaturity of the meme ecology in decades past compared to now. slang fluency and fluidity are essential life skills to an unprecedented degree
